headline: Has The Recent Slide In Apollo Global Management (APO) Created A Valuation Opportunity?
summary: If you are wondering whether Apollo Global Management's current share price matches its underlying worth, this article walks through the key numbers that matter most for valuation. The stock last closed at US$104.44, with returns of a 3.9% decline over 7 days, 17.7% decline over 30 days, 28.8% decline year to date, 21.1% decline over 1 year, 94.2% over 3 years and 145.5% over 5 years, which may catch the eye of investors thinking about both risk and long term potential. Recent news coverage...
